case_title: LUISA SANTOS VS. BRANT BLOEM et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SANTOS, LUISA AS TO DEFENDANT BLOEM, BRANT PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($55.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED SEP-06-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BLOEM, BRANT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED SEP-14-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN KOO--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-24-2012 AT 8:30 AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTOS, LUISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLOEM, BRANT $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,130.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
